articles.author: Andrew Cunningham
articles.title: Two-year-old Surface PCs get $300 price hikes as sub-$1,000 models go away - Ars Technica
articles.description: Paying more for the same stuff" is the story of consumer technology in 2026.

articles.author: Zack Whittaker
articles.title: Someone planted backdoors in dozens of WordPress plugins used in thousands of websites - TechCrunch
articles.description: Dozens of WordPress plug-ins were allegedly hijacked to push malware after they were sold to a new corporate owner.
articles.content: Dozens of plug-ins for the widely used open source web blogging software WordPress are now offline after a backdoor was discovered in them, used to push malicious code to any website that relied on t… [+1788 chars]
